chunks.title: David's Conquests and Spoils
chunks.reason: Describes military victories over Philistines, Moab, and Zobah, including the capture of bronze and gold.

chunks.title: Diplomacy and Further Victories
chunks.reason: Details Toi's tribute from Hamath, David's dedication of spoils to Yahweh, and the subjugation of Edom.

chunks.title: Summary of Reign and Officials
chunks.reason: Summarizes David's just rule and lists the key administrative and military officials in his court.
